name: virustotal_scan
description: Scans a URL, domain, IP address, or file hash against VirusTotal to check for malware or malicious activity. Requires a VirusTotal API key in config (virustotal.api_key).

parameters.resource: The URL, domain, IP address, or file hash (MD5/SHA1/SHA256) to scan

returns: Scan results showing detection ratio and vendor results from VirusTotal
